text:
sunpoet     2010-10-28 16:14:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc             Makefile 
  Added files:
    textproc/p5-CSS-Simple Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  - Add p5-CSS-Simple-2874
  
  CSS::Simple is an interface through which to read/write/manipulate CSS
  files while respecting the cascade order.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/CSS-Simple
  
  PR:             ports/151798
  Submitted by:   Vivek Khera <vivek@khera.org>
  Approved by:    pgollucci (mentor, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1491    +1 -0      ports/textproc/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/textproc/p5-CSS-Simple/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/textproc/p5-CSS-Simple/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/textproc/p5-CSS-Simple/pkg-descr (new)
